info.name: ReviewFlow — Unified API Tests
info.description:
Canonical API test harness for ReviewFlow.

**Build workflow**
1. `@postman-test-suite-audit scan all` writes `postman/.generation/{feature}.postman_collection.json`
2. `cd postman && npm run merge` → this file

**Run**
- Postman: import this collection + `ReviewFlow_Test_Environments.postman_environment.json`
- Newman: `cd postman && npm test`

Legacy collections (`ReviewFlow_Comprehensive_v2.json`, etc.) remain for reference.

item.name: 00_SETUP
item.description: Log in each role. Tokens are HTTP-only cookies — Postman cookie jar handles auth for later requests. Run this folder before feature tests.

request.description:
**Role:** public
**Spec:** controller_specs/01_Module_Auth.md
**Notes:** Sets access/refresh cookies in jar.
